services.subtitle: We don't just sell a chatbot. We build the complete AI infrastructure for your business to scale efficiently.
services.service1_desc: Agents configured with your brand identity — they handle inquiries, qualify, route, and convert on WhatsApp at any hour, with no team required.
service1_items: 100% your tone of voice and personality
services.service2_desc: Ad management (Meta Ads and Google Ads) integrated into your sales funnel so every lead is captured and engaged at exactly the right speed.
services.service3_desc: Images, creatives, and videos generated with AI for campaigns, content, and sales materials — no creative agency needed.
services.service4_desc: For operations that need more: CRM, internal automations, websites, apps, and integrations built on an AI-first foundation.

benefits.subtitle: Efficiency isn't about working harder. It's about having the right system working in the right place, at the right time.
benefits.b1_desc: Your business responds, qualifies, and converts while you sleep. No on-call shifts, no overtime, no lead lost to slow response.
benefits.b2_desc: Leads automatically qualified and routed at the right moment to close — your sales funnel running on autopilot.
benefits.b3_desc: Handle hundreds of customers simultaneously. The AI absorbs the operational volume while your team focuses on strategy.
benefits.b4_desc: Zero wait time. The customer reaches out and instantly gets a reply — 100x faster than any human agent.
benefits.b5_desc: Tone, identity, and flows fully tailored. The agent represents your brand — not a generic AI.
benefits.b6_desc: Support, conversion, and results reports delivered with real analysis from your dedicated AI manager.

faq.q1: How long does it take to set up the Agent?
faq.a1: Usually between 3 and 14 days, depending on your business complexity. We run an initial diagnosis, configure the flows, run thorough testing, and only go live when everything is perfect.
faq.q2: Can the Agent be customized for my brand?
faq.a2: Absolutely. We tailor the tone of voice, language, agent name, conversation flows, and everything else to reflect 100% of your company's identity. Your customers won't even realize they're talking to AI.
faq.q3: Does it work for any type of business?
faq.a3: It works for any business that receives inquiries via WhatsApp. Clinics, e-commerce, real estate, restaurants, gyms, course creators, retail stores — any industry.
faq.q4: What if the customer wants to speak to a human?
faq.a4: The agent detects when human support is needed and automatically routes the conversation to your team, with the full context already summarized.
faq.q5: Do I need to be tech-savvy to use it?
faq.a5: Not at all. We handle everything technical. You just give us information about your business and we do the rest. After setup, day-to-day management is simple and intuitive.
faq.q6: Is there a long-term contract or lock-in?
faq.a6: No long-term commitments. You can cancel at any time. We believe the best way to keep clients is by delivering results — not trapping them in contracts.

footer.description: AI performance agency. We build the support, sales, and automation infrastructure for your business.

simulator.msg1: Hi, I saw your ad. How does it work to set up an agent for my business?
simulator.msg2:
Hello! I'm WAVE's AI 🧠

I handle your customer support end-to-end. I can qualify and schedule all your leads — directly on WhatsApp, in seconds.

What industry are you in?
simulator.msg3: I run an aesthetic clinic. I'd like to know the pricing.
simulator.msg4:
Perfect! For clinics, I significantly reduce no-shows using proactive reminders and close packages right on WhatsApp.

Projects typically vary based on the size of your operation and lead volume.

Can I schedule a quick call to show you how it works in practice?
simulator.msg6:
Done! I've scheduled it for tomorrow at 2:00 PM.

You just received the invite in your Calendar. Talk soon! ✨
